sales.description:
Ancients
Tiberius II Constantine (AD 578-582). AE follis or 40 nummi (31mm, 6h). NGC Choice Fine, scratches. Theoupolis (Antioch), 3rd officina, dated Regnal Year 4 (AD 578). d m TIO CONS-TNT PP AT, cuirassed bust of Tiberius II facing, wearing crown with cross and pendilia, globus cruciger in right hand, shield decorated with horseman motif in left / Large M (mark of value); A/N/N/O to left, II/II (date) to right, cross above, Γ (officina) below, tHEuP' in exergue. Sear 447.

From the A Pugnu...

sales.description:
Ancients
Maurice Tiberius (AD 582-602). AE follis or 40 nummi (32mm, 6h). NGC VF. Theoupolis (Antioch), dated Regnal Year 5 (AD 586/7). ΠINΛIOC S - TIANTAPPV, facing bust of Maurice Tiberius in consular robes, wearing crown with pendilia and trefoil ornament, mappa in right hand, scepter surmounted by eagle in left / Large M (mark of value); A/N/N/O in left field, Ϥ (date) in right field, cross above, tHEuP' in exergue. Sear 532.

From the A Pugnus Maximus Collection by Mandy Farris Woods.  ww...
